caption: The video appears to be an informational or promotional piece related to a project supported by IOM Jordan and funded by the European Union. The frames display a static image with text stating, "This project is implemented by IOM Jordan with the support and funds of the European Union." Accompanying this text are two logos: one for IOM (International Organization for Migration) on the left, featuring a globe with silhouettes of people, and the European Union flag on the right, which consists of a blue background with a circle of yellow stars. The overall design is simple and professional, likely intended to convey the collaborative effort between IOM Jordan and the EU in implementing the project. There is no visible action or movement in the frames, suggesting that this segment of the video serves as an introductory or concluding title card.
